title: Hardcore Adventures
description: Well Optimized / Vanilla style / Fresh / Hardcore / Graphics
body:
![Hardcore Adv logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e75104242ed1ef4b9ca55edf20f0a21ad08613b2.png)

I’m going to make a completely new version 2.0 in this major update we will switch to neoforge and fashions adding content will not be limited to the core. I promise you we will have no contradictions, I've thought about it.

### 🎯 Main Goals

*   ⚙️ **Excellent Optimization**
*   🌿 **Fresh Vanilla Style**
*   🕊️ **Chill & Relaxing**
*   ⚔️ **Hardcore Mobs Bosses**
*   🏞️ **Awesome Exploration**
*   🚀 **Completely Fresh**
*   🎮 **Fun for Playing**

### 📦 Content

**The mods are perfectly configured, own datapack and texturepack were made!**

*   🐉 **8 New Bosses**
*   🌸 **Graphics and Quality improvements**
*   🏰 **Unique Structures & Dungeons**
*   👾 **Improved Mobs AI**
*   🌍 **Fresh Worldgen**
*   ⚔️ **Weapons and Armor**
*   ☠️ **Mechanics**

Also just a bunch of fun additions, items. Absolute vanilla plus.

### 🎮 Gameplay

0.  **Chill** from Minecraft
1.  **Explore** the World
2.  **Loot** Challenging Dungeons
3.  **Defeat** Bosses to get Unique Eyes
4.  **Activate** the Portal using eyes
5.  **Kill** the Ender Dragon

Just relax, enjoy, explore here. You can also install Distant Horizons.

### 🎉 Showcase
Not ready now :( You can share with me your gameplay in my discord server!

### ❤️ Thanks
All you can do is **add** the project **to your favorites**. This will be the best help to the project.



### Installation 
Just install normal launcher :) I use Astralrinth, Prism 0_o

### Contact me 
qwedimonxd77@gmail.com

### Inspiration
Still I have to mention that the modpack was heavily inspired by BA+ and I will never forget this atmosphere of very fresh and beautiful spring minecraft. But my computer is too weak and I wanted real hardcore, so thats why HA exists. Minecraft modpacks...💊
